context: Evaluates whether the agent, reviewing a plan whose mechanism runs only from the pre-push hook, produces a review that traces that execution path to its coverage and flags the stated goal as unmet. This exercises the execution-location lens added to the Risk (BLIND SPOTS) and Strategic (COMPLETENESS) reviewer prompts.

checklist.name: Standard workflow
checklist.description: Agent composes a brief, handles model selection, spawns 3 reviewers in parallel, and produces a consolidated report

checklist.name: Identifies the execution path
checklist.description: The report explicitly notes the link checker's only trigger is the pre-push hook

checklist.name: Reasons about bypass
checklist.description: The report identifies who or what bypasses that trigger (local --no-verify, CI / web merges) rather than only internal mechanics

checklist.name: Concludes goal is unmet
checklist.description: The report concludes the 'nothing broken ever ships' goal is not met by a pre-push-only mechanism

checklist.name: Recommends broader reach
checklist.description: The report recommends a path that also runs where code ships (e.g. a CI job), not just the pre-push hook
